title: May 26
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}
'''May 26''' is the 146th day of the year (147th in leap years). There are 219 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1900s#1907|1907]] – [[John Wayne]] is born.
*[[1910s#1913|1913]] – [[Peter Cushing]] is born.
*[[1930s#1939|1939]] – [[Herb Trimpe]] is born.
*[[1975]] – [[TJ Ramini]] is born.
*[[1999]] – ''[[Classic Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... 3]]'' published.
*1999 – ''[[Star Wars: Episode I The Visual Dictionary]]'' published.
*1999 – ''[[Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace 4]]'' published.
*[[2004]] – [[Empire 20|''Empire'' 20]] published.
*2004 – [[Star Wars: Empire: Volume Two: Darklighter|''Star Wars: Empire: Darklighter'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[2006]] – "[[Deep Spoilers]]" published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2009]] - [[Star Wars Battlefront: Elite Squadron]] is announced.
*[[2010]] – [[Invasion: Rescues 1|''Invasion: Rescues'' 1]] published.
*2010 – [[Legacy (2006) 48|''Legacy'' (2006) 48]] published.
*[[2021]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 10|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 10]] published.
*2021 – [[Darth Vader (2020) 12|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 12]] published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Adventures: The Weapon of a Jedi 1|''Star Wars Adventures: The Weapon of the Jedi'' 1]] published.
*[[2022]] – [[Celebration Anaheim (2022)|Celebration Anaheim]] begins.
*2022 – [[Part I]] and [[Part II]] of [[Star Wars: Obi-Wan Kenobi|''Obi-Wan Kenobi'']] released on [[Disney+]].
*[[2023]] – "[[The Jellyfruit Pursuit / Creature Safari]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
*[[2026]] – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Adventures — The Complete Phase III Part 1]]'' to be published.
<noinclude>
